name: Blade Arc
prompt: Two glowing energy blades intersecting in a wide dynamic arc. Radiant orange rim lighting. Geometric African patterns in the background.

name: Iron Stance
prompt: A heavy geometric shield plate glowing with tribal engravings. Concentric energy shielding rings radiating outwards.

name: Sunder
prompt: A heavy energy blade shattering an obsidian wall, stone fragments and orange embers exploding outward.

name: Twin Fangs
prompt: Two glowing crossed dagger blades held symmetrically, radiating sharp energy sparks.

name: Ironwave
prompt: A wave of obsidian spikes rising from the ground, glowing with inner orange cracks.

name: Pommel Strike
prompt: A heavy sword hilt striking forward, surrounded by concentric impact rings.

name: Cleave
prompt: A wide horizontal blade sweep leaving a trailing arc of ember light.

name: Crosscut
prompt: Two diagonal slashing lines intersecting in an X pattern, highly stylized.

name: Shrug It Off
prompt: A heavy shield blocking a barrage of incoming energy arrows.

name: Thunderclap
prompt: A powerful shockwave expanding from a clenched fist, concentric soundwave rings.

name: Rising Strike
prompt: An upward blade slash with trailing vertical light beams and embers.

name: War Trance
prompt: Concentric orbital circles surrounding a single focused eye, high contrast.

name: Ember Within
prompt: A human heart glowing with molten orange embers and crackling energy lines.

name: Bulwark
prompt: A massive blocky obsidian wall shield with geometric patterns.

name: Read the Tell
prompt: Profile portrait of a warrior woman with Bantu knots, glowing eyes, and white geometric face paint, analyzing targeting lines.

name: Shockwave
prompt: Ground cracking open with radiant orange energy lines, stone fragments hovering.

name: Disarm
prompt: A broken sword falling in half, its blade shattered, surrounded by static interference.

name: Whirlwind
prompt: A swirling vortex of wind and blade outlines in a concentric circle.

name: Ancestral Fury
prompt: A ghostly fist silhouette punching downward, surrounded by tribal sunburst rays.

name: Blood Offering
prompt: A glowing blood droplet dripping onto an ancient geometric stone altar.

name: Devour
prompt: A dark silhouette of a monstrous mouth with sharp glowing orange teeth.

name: Harvest
prompt: A glowing curved scythe blade cutting through stalks of energy.

name: Skyfall
prompt: A massive war hammer falling from a stormy cloud, struck by lightning.

name: Jab
prompt: A quick fist strike or thrust, surrounded by speed lines and sparks.

name: Refrain
prompt: A clean musical note symbol inside a protective shield outline.

name: Cutting Verse
prompt: Glowing musical notes with sharp blade-like edges cutting through space.

name: Blight Needle
prompt: A thin glowing poison needle dripping dark liquid.

name: Quickstep
prompt: Stylized footprints showing movement, with trailing speed lines.

name: Double Tap
prompt: Two tribal drums being struck simultaneously, soundwaves emanating.

name: Crescendo
prompt: A stylized African kora instrument neck projecting radiating soundwaves and concentric circles.

name: Deflect
prompt: A curved sound board blocking incoming projectiles, vibrational waves.

name: Shard Burst
prompt: Crystalline shards exploding outward from a central point.

name: Backbeat
prompt: A large bass drum radiating low-frequency concentric soundwave rings.

name: Venom Chorus
prompt: Multiple poison droplets falling like rain, glowing green and orange.

name: Syncopation
prompt: Profile of a bard singer with concentric soundwaves, matching the style-key silhouette.

name: Accelerando
prompt: Fast-paced tempo lines and spinning gears, high energy.

name: Catalyst
prompt: A chemical flask bubbling with green and orange acid, steam rising.

name: Bouncing Verse
prompt: A musical note bouncing between two geometric walls, soundwaves.

name: Veil
prompt: A crescent moon shrouded in cosmic smoke and star patterns.

name: Blight Bloom
prompt: A decaying flower dripping poison droplets, organic shapes.

name: The Long Song
prompt: An endless winding path of musical stave lines disappearing into a stellar background.

name: Grand Finale
prompt: A massive explosion of soundwaves and fireworks, filling the frame.

name: Pulse
prompt: An expanding concentric ring of electrical energy and lightning sparks.

name: Barrier
prompt: A glowing triangular geometric barrier shield, stellar patterns.

name: Storm Channel
prompt: Swirling vortex of cosmic energy orbs and lightning, sunburst patterns.

name: Resonate

name: Static Burst

name: Frostbind

name: Coolhead

name: Capacitor
